title: Post by barbicancentre
description:
Unconventional musicals that will make even non-fans change their tune 🎵

Mermaids, stand-up comedians and more take the lead in a selection of films that move through genres, styles, and the blurring of drama and reality. (Plus, a John Turturro classic for the Severance fans...)

The latest of these offerings flipping the script is Mona Fastvold’s historical drama The Testament of Ann Lee, screening in our cinemas now. 💫

Get your tickets via the linkinbio. 🔼

#musicals #filmrecommendation #barbicancentre
